Name: Contrast
Measure: Exponentially weighted difference in EVI between adjacent pixels

Name: Correlation
Measure: Linear dependency of EVI on adjacent pixels

Name: Dissimilarity
Measure: Difference in EVI between adjacent pixels

Name: Homogeneity
Measure: Similarity of EVI between adjacent pixels

Name: Maximum
Measure: Dominance of EVI combinations between adjacent pixels

Name: Variance
Measure: Dispersion of EVI combinations between adjacent pixels
